channel.title: NPR Programs: Morning Edition
channel.description: Morning Edition takes listeners around the country and the world with multi-faceted stories and commentaries every weekday. Hosts Steve Inskeep, Leila Fadel, Michel Martin and A Martínez bring you the latest breaking news and features to prepare you for the day.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Trump says U.S. will blockade Iranian ports after peace talks fail
item.description: On Sunday, President Trump said the U.S. would blockade the Strait of Hormuz after negotiations between the U.S. and Iran broke down over the weekend.
item.content:encoded: On Sunday, President Trump said the U.S. would blockade the Strait of Hormuz after negotiations between the U.S. and Iran broke down over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Greg Myre

item.title: Retired U.S. Navy admiral on Trump's threat to blockade the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: NPR's Michel Martin speaks to retired U.S. Navy Adm. James Foggo, dean of the Center for Maritime Strategy, about President Trump's command to blockade the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Michel Martin speaks to retired U.S. Navy Adm. James Foggo, dean of the Center for Maritime Strategy, about President Trump's command to blockade the Strait of Hormuz.
item.dc:creator: Michel Martin

item.title: Pope Leo stands firm with Trump as Vatican–Washington rift deepens over Iran war
item.description: Pope Leo XIV says he will not be deterred by criticism from President Trump, vowing to continue his calls for peace as tensions escalate between the Vatican and Washington over the Iran conflict.
item.content:encoded:
Pope Leo XIV says he will not be deterred by criticism from President Trump, vowing to continue his calls for peace as tensions escalate between the Vatican and Washington over the Iran conflict.

(Image credit: Andrew Medichini)
item.dc:creator: Emmanuel Akinwotu

item.title: Can red light therapy really deliver a beauty and health glow-up? Here's the science
item.description: Wellness influencers tout the therapy's power for everything from rejuvenating skin and hair to boosting longevity. Devices sold for at-home use abound. We look at the evidence behind the hype.
item.content:encoded: Wellness influencers tout the therapy's power for everything from rejuvenating skin and hair to boosting longevity. Devices sold for at-home use abound. We look at the evidence behind the hype.
item.dc:creator: Maria Godoy

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: President Trump says U.S. will blockade the Strait of Hormuz, failed U.S.-Iran negotiations cause oil prices to surge, Hungary's Viktor Orbán loses reelection bid.
item.content:encoded: President Trump says U.S. will blockade the Strait of Hormuz, failed U.S.-Iran negotiations cause oil prices to surge, Hungary's Viktor Orbán loses reelection bid.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: Rory McIlroy wins Masters for second year in a row
item.description: The Masters wrapped up on Sunday with last year's champion, Rory McIlroy, winning another green jacket in Augusta, Georgia, at the most prestigious golf tournament in the United States.
item.content:encoded: The Masters wrapped up on Sunday with last year's champion, Rory McIlroy, winning another green jacket in Augusta, Georgia, at the most prestigious golf tournament in the United States.
item.dc:creator: Steve Futterman

item.title: How 'taking chances' got 'Titaníque' from a basement theatre to Broadway
item.description: "Titaníque," a musical parody of the James Cameron film using Céline Dion's songs, opened Sunday on Broadway after getting its unlikely start in a tiny off-Broadway basement theater.
item.content:encoded: "Titaníque," a musical parody of the James Cameron film using Céline Dion's songs, opened Sunday on Broadway after getting its unlikely start in a tiny off-Broadway basement theater.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Lunden

item.title: Rep. Eric Swalwell suspends his bid for California governor amid assault allegations
item.description: U.S. Rep. Eric Swalwell is suspending his campaign for governor of California, as he faces allegations of sexual assault and misconduct.
item.content:encoded: U.S. Rep. Eric Swalwell is suspending his campaign for governor of California, as he faces allegations of sexual assault and misconduct.
item.dc:creator: Guy Marzorati

item.title: Congress returns to Washington with lengthy to-do list
item.description: Congress returns this week after a two-week recess and they have a long to-do list.
item.content:encoded: Congress returns this week after a two-week recess and they have a long to-do list.
item.dc:creator: Eric McDaniel

item.title: People with dementia find joy thanks to Denver choir
item.description: A new choir in Denver for people with memory loss sparks joy through the healing power of music.
item.content:encoded: A new choir in Denver for people with memory loss sparks joy through the healing power of music.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Warner
